name: python3-github
title: python3-github
summary: Access the full Github API v3 from Python3
description:
Access the full Github API v3 from Python3
This is a Python library to access the Github API v3.
With it, you can manage Github resources (repositories, user
profiles, organizations, etc.) from Python scripts.
.
It covers almost the full API and all methods are tested against the
real Github site.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-github because Access the full Github API v3 from Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-github as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-github with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-github --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
